votes.rationale: WS-D real-write proof complete: 12/12 Wave 0 artifacts emitted. One minimal fix applied (removed paths:portal/src/** from deriveTopology). Idempotency confirmed: second run skipped all 12. Generator validated as a practical baseline tool.

Fix was minimal and directly justified by proof observation. Post-fix verification covers the corrected state. Write → observe → fix → re-write → verify sequence is the correct proof-and-fix flow. Both challenges (out/ directory safety, mid-proof fix) resolved without blocking objections.

All classification boundaries held under real writes. Idempotency works correctly. The defect found (portal/src/** path bleeding into generated projects) was caught and fixed by the proof. Program is stronger for it.
